title: Verify the display of current atmospheric pressure and altitude
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Verify that the current atmospheric pressure (977.43 hPa) and altitude (705.3 ft) are displayed in the circular gauge-style interface.
expected_result: The current atmospheric pressure and altitude are correctly displayed.

title: Check the functionality of the menu icon
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Tap the menu icon on the left of the app header. | Verify that the menu options are displayed.
expected_result: The menu options are displayed correctly.

title: Test the graph icon functionality
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Tap the graph icon in the center of the app header. | Verify that the graph view is displayed.
expected_result: The graph view is displayed correctly.

title: Test the three-dot menu icon functionality
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Tap the three-dot menu icon on the right of the app header. | Verify that the menu options are displayed.
expected_result: The menu options are displayed correctly.

title: Check the footer progress bar and trash bin icon
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Verify that the footer progress bar indicates 'Memory is full' and the trash bin icon has a notification badge showing '99'.
expected_result: The footer progress bar and trash bin icon are displayed correctly.

title: Test navigation to other screens
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Tap the menu icon on the left of the app header. | Select an option from the menu. | Verify that the app navigates to the selected screen.
expected_result: The app navigates to the selected screen correctly.

title: Test the usability of the app
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Verify that the app is easy to use and navigate.
expected_result: The app is easy to use and navigate.

title: Test the accessibility of the app
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Verify that the app is accessible to users with disabilities.
expected_result: The app is accessible to users with disabilities.

title: Test data persistence
test_steps: Open the Barometer Plus app. | Exit the app and relaunch it. | Verify that the current atmospheric pressure and altitude are still displayed.
expected_result: The current atmospheric pressure and altitude are still displayed.
